heroHeadline: Day 41: North Korea Draws Lessons from Iran War; Israeli Lebanon Strikes Threaten Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: NYT reports North Korea is testing new weapons and studying the Iran conflict's air war. Fresh Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon kill several people, straining the fragile US-Iran ceasefire. Trump keeps US military near Iran pending a 'real agreement.'
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-09. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal.
